tooltip.nameless_trinkets.ethereal_wings: I will conquer the sky. Slowly.
tooltip.nameless_trinkets.fractured_null: Huh? Magic isn't real, you idiot.
tooltip.nameless_trinkets.dragons_eye_lo: "It's all you can see when you're blinded by fear."
tooltip.nameless_trinkets.rage_mind_lore: A terror from a forsaken era.
tooltip.nameless_trinkets.rage_mind_1: Marks the entity that dares to damage you, and any like it.
tooltip.nameless_trinkets.rage_mind_2: Deal increased damage to marked targets.
tooltip.nameless_trinkets.creeper_sense_: A sober person would throw it...
Crouching will cause a non-destructive explosion.
